Fig. 7. CCPN inhibited inflammation and lung damage caused by SAP in mice. A-D: mRNA expression of cytokines in each group. E: MPO protein expression in
each group. F: Total number of cells in BALF in each group. G: Protein content in BALF in each group. H: CD177-positive cells in the lung tissue in each group. I-J:
S. aureus load in the lungs in each group. The data are expressed as the mean ± SEM (n = 3). P values are determined by one-way ANOVA. **P < 0.01, ***P < 0.001,
